basic_details.job_title: TISS Academic Programme Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Psychology, Social Work- Mental Health or PG diploma in Counselling and allied fields with a minimum of 55% of Aggregate marks, Five years of work experience in academic, research, and publication work, Good writing and speaking skills
qualification.details: Master's Degree in Psychology, Social Work- Mental Health or PG diploma in Counselling and allied fields with a minimum of 55% of Aggregate marks. Five years of work experience in academic, research, and publication work. Good writing and speaking skills.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TISS Academic Programme Manager Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download TISS Academic Programme Manager Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Academic Programme Manager post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Academic Programme Manager position at TISS is 20th June 2026. Ensure you complete and submit your application before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Psychology, Social Work- Mental Health, or a PG diploma in Counselling and allied fields with at least 55% marks. Additionally, five years of relevant work experience is necessary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Academic Programme Manager position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Academic Programme Manager post is 45 years as of the application deadline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Academic Programme Manager position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Academic Programme Manager post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy announced for the Academic Programme Manager position in the TISS recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for different categories?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 125/- for SC/ST candidates. Women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Academic Programme Manager post primarily involves a Personal Interaction round. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in this stage.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract position?
faq.answer: The Academic Programme Manager position is offered on a contract basis as per the TISS recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website of TISS is also provided.

faq.question: Q10. What is the work experience required for the Academic Programme Manager role?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to have a minimum of five years of work experience in academic, research, and publication work to be eligible for the Academic Programme Manager position.
